subject: Fermi  trigger No 684716840: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov, V.Kornilov, E.Gorbovskoy, K.Zhirkov, N.Tyurina, P.Balanutsa, A.Kuznetsov, D. Vlasenko,

(Lomonosov Moscow State University, SAI, Physics Department),

(Irkutsk State University, API),

L.Carrasco, J.R.Valdes, V.Chavushyan, V.M.Patino Alvarez, J.Martinez, A.R.Corella, L.H.Rodriguez 
(INAOE, Guillermo Haro Astrophysics Observatory),

A. Tlatov, D. Dormidontov 
(Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),

A. Gabovich, V.Yurkov 
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)


MASTER-SAAO robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in South Africa (South African Astronomical Observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB220912.96 (trigger No 684716840,20h 49m 31.20s , +18d 27m 36.0s, R=71.63) errorbox  12 sec after notice time and 45 sec after trigger time at 2022-09-12 23:08:00 UT, with upper limit up to  18.5 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 47 deg. The sun  altitude  is -61.0 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -16 deg., longitude l = 64 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=2086764

We obtain a following upper limits.
